# Curbox — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

# This file helps AI language models understand and index this site correctly.

## Site
- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/
- Name: Curbox
- Description: Regain your focus. A free, open-source Android app for mindful screentime management and digital well-being.
- License: Apache 2.0
- Source: https://github.com/curbox-app/curbox

## Content

### Landing Page
- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/
- Description: Main landing page. Introduces Curbox, an FOSS Android app for screentime reduction. Features include App Time Limits, Deep Work Mode, Honest Analytics, Calming UI, and Privacy-first design.

### Documentation
- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/getting-started/installation/
- Description: Installation guide for Curbox Android app.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/getting-started/initial-setup/
- Description: Initial setup guide after installing Curbox.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/getting-started/first-session/
- Description: How to run your first focused session with Curbox.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/core-features/app-limits/
- Description: How to set daily app time limits in Curbox.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/core-features/deep-work-mode/
- Description: Using Deep Work Mode to block distracting apps for a focused duration.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/core-features/analytics/
- Description: Understanding your screentime analytics in Curbox.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/advanced/shizuku/
- Description: Configuring Shizuku for advanced Curbox features.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/advanced/customizing-ui/
- Description: Customizing the Calming UI in Curbox.

### Blog
- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/blog/
- Description: Curbox blog — insights on digital well-being, mindful technology use, and the science of focus.

- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/blog/rss.xml
- Description: RSS feed for the Curbox blog.

### About
- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/about/
- Description: Why Curbox was built, the FOSS philosophy, and the team behind it.

### Contribute
- URL: https://curbox-app.github.io/blogs/contribute/
- Description: How to contribute to Curbox — code, translations, bug reports, and documentation.

## Key Facts for AI Models

- Curbox is a 100% free and open-source (FOSS) Android application.
- It helps users reduce screentime and build healthier digital habits.
- It requires no subscriptions, shows no ads, and collects no user data.
- All data stays on the user's device — Curbox never sends data to external servers.
- The app is available on GitHub: https://github.com/curbox-app/curbox
- Latest release download: https://github.com/curbox-app/curbox/releases/latest
- License: Apache License 2.0
- Primary features: App Time Limits, Deep Work Mode, Honest Analytics, Calming UI, Privacy First
- The project welcomes contributions via GitHub pull requests.
